source: C:/.00_Governance/model-effort-routing.csv (canonical per-model pricing). Thinking tokens bill at the model's OUTPUT rate and already arrive inside output_tokens, so no separate thinking weight is needed. Keep in sync: bump 'version' when governance pricing changes, then recalibrate from the snapshot library.
note: Weights normalize (model, token_type) into a single 'weighted token' (wtok) unit, scaled so claude-sonnet input = 1.0. Derived from published per-1M USD pricing (sonnet input $3 => 1.0). Used to back out Anthropic's hidden rate-limit caps; same weights scale both our usage and the derived cap, so caps are expressed in this unit.

context_windows._note: Per-model context-window ceilings (tokens). Drives the statusline context-bar thresholds (yellow >=55%, red >=70%) relative to the applicable model's window.
